generated_exposure.exposure_text:
🚨 Did you know our allies are quietly reducing their defense budgets while expecting us to bear the burden? 🚨

As a mom who cares about security, I worry our current alliance commitments leave us vulnerable. Why should we keep paying more than our fair share when others aren't holding up their end?

#NationalSecurity #FairShare #AllianceCommitments
